name: OCR-triggered door unlock
description: Read text, signage, or license plates in front of a camera with Gemini and unlock a door when the OCR'd text matches a target string (a VIP plate, vendor name, employee badge code, etc.). Every match also gets logged to Helix as an OCR Match event so you have an audit trail of who/what got let in.
summary: Motion webhook → Gemini OCR (JSON) → condition → unlock door + Helix log

attributes.Match Value: (fill in the target value you matched on)
